text:
できてるできてる！
……わたしよりうまいかも。

もうあなたに教えることはない……
って、それは冗談だけどさ。
でもほんと、悪くなかったよ。

数撃ちゃ当たる、じゃないけど
数撃ちゃ慣れる！
日々訓練だよー、訓練！

See? You've got it! You uhh, might even be
better than me, if we're being honest here...

I don't think there's anything left I could
possibly teach--Nah, I'm just kidding! Still,
you were a real natural.

Shoot enough times and you'll eventually hit
something, but shoot even more than that and
it'll all come together! Practice, practice!
